currentLinkedIn.headline: Senior Product Manager at Helios Labs
currentLinkedIn.about: I turn messy problems into shipped products. Eight years helping teams build things people actually use.

experience.title: Senior Product Manager
bullets: Owned the core onboarding funnel; improved activation rate from 34% to 61% in two quarters
Led cross-functional team of 12 to launch AI-assisted search, driving 28% lift in session length

experience.title: Product Manager
bullets: Defined and shipped three major dashboard features now used by 4,000+ enterprise accounts
Ran weekly discovery interviews with customers; maintained a living insight repository
